title: 10 best herbal creams for hemorrhoids
description: Plantain creams helps with hemorrhoids because of their anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm irritated tissues. The cream's astringent agents constrict blood vessels, reducing swelling and bleeding. Additionally, plantain's antiseptic qualities prevent infection and promote healing, while its emollient properties moisturize and soften the affected area.
